home.heroTitle: For foreign investors starting a hospitality business in Japan.
home.heroTitleLine2: From property acquisition to opening — we handle it all.
home.heroDescription: Ziyou Real Estate is a licensed Tokyo brokerage specializing in hospitality property for foreign investors. Pre-purchase diagnosis, brokerage, and opening PM — end-to-end.
home.features: Three Strengths Built for Hospitality Property
home.featuresDesc: When a foreign investor wants to open a hotel, ryokan, or minpaku in Japan, what does it actually take? We don't stop at listing properties — we help all the way to opening day.
home.feature1Desc: Zoning, fire code, building code, hokenjo (health bureau) — we surface the issues that derail deals after closing, before you commit.
home.feature2Desc: Property sourcing, contract, licensing preparation, construction and fit-out, and opening day. We coordinate the specialists at each stage.
home.feature3Desc: Japanese, English, and Chinese (Simplified and Traditional) — we bridge between you and the city office, contractors, accountants, and specialists from start to finish.
home.benefit1Desc: Ryokan licensing, fire compliance, vertical fire compartmentation (tatena-kukaku) — practical knowledge from real cases, not textbooks.
home.benefit2Title: We Don't Walk Away After the Sale
home.benefit2Desc: We stay through opening preparation. Our job is to make sure you don't end up stuck with a building you can't operate.
home.benefit3Title: We Won't Push a Property Without a Clear Path
home.benefit3Desc: As a boutique brokerage focused only on hospitality property, we evaluate every building against licensing, fire, building, and operational realities — and walk away from the ones that don't add up.
home.ctaDescription: Register for free to use favorites and contact property owners
home.newListingsDesc: Properties currently listed. If anything catches your attention, get in touch — we'll also introduce off-market candidates that fit your criteria.
home.exclusiveBannerTitle: We check whether the property can actually run as a hospitality business — before you buy
home.exclusiveBannerDesc: Zoning, fire code, building code, health bureau (hokenjo) — the issues that become fatal once you've closed. We surface them before purchase. If a property has no clear licensing path, we won't recommend it. Our job is to make sure you don't get stuck after buying.
home.exclusiveBannerStats2: Tokyo 23 wards + Greater Tokyo & key destinations
home.exclusiveBannerLpNote: Pre-purchase review page is in English
